mnemonics.title: HALT for Homogeneous Solutions
mnemonics.content: Homogeneous form → Auxiliary equation → Linear solutions → Terminate with constants

acronyms.expansion: Linear Recurrence Relations with Constant Coefficients
acronyms.usage: Core concept in algorithm analysis and combinatorics

visualTips.visualization: Imagine equation roots as branches determining solution components

analogies.analogy: Like domino effects - each term knocks over the next according to fixed rules
